title: Waypoint teleport appeared to freeze
details: Server was sometimes started with plain FXServer +exec server.cfg instead of the txAdmin profile. The corrected BAT now launches +set serverProfile default.

title: Horse invisible or failed to recall
details: OneSync was enabled and the horse model name is converted with GetHashKey before CreatePed. Horse recall now works reliably when the correct server profile is launched.

title: Player loaded at random towns
details: Coordinate saving was added to vorp_core and the save interval was reduced to 10 seconds. Continue testing disconnect versus full quit behavior.

title: Bow occasionally refuses to reload arrows
details: Bow and arrows work, but reload behavior has been intermittent.

title: Some animals cannot be skinned or plucked
details: Bison, Whitetail Buck, and some Wild Turkey carcasses did not produce the interaction despite model entries existing in vorp_hunting.
